hero.question: Will Minnesota Vikings win the 2027 NFL NFC Championship?
hero.prob_take: At 7.5%, the market has essentially priced the Vikings out of contention, requiring a perfect storm of health, development, and playoff luck to reach the Super Bowl. The jury is still out on whether Minnesota's QB situation settles into legitimacy this season, and that uncertainty alone probably justifies staying below 10%, making this a fair fade until we see real evidence.

daily_take.headline: Vikings NFC Championship Odds Crumbling: The Market's Finally Pricing Reality
daily_take.deck: Minnesota's title odds dropped 1 point overnight to 7.5%, but that's still too generous for a franchise that hasn't won a playoff game since 2019. The Vikings have the talent to make noise, but they're in the hardest conference in football with Kansas City, Buffalo, and Philadelphia all looking sharper. Sharps should be selling any bump above 8%.
